rationale: Section 49.303 governs which property may be detached and annexed; it does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). The proposed increase has no bearing on this provision.
quote: Only the following property may be detached and annexed under this subchapter
_note: No conflict identified. The rule concerns property detachment/annexation eligibility and does not incorporate or reference the homestead exemption dollar amount.
